prInfo.title: [GRT-6669] - feat: kafka 2.0.19 상향
prInfo.body:
### 개요
- https://doodlin.atlassian.net/browse/GRT-6669
- 루트 `build.gradle.kts`의 `doodlin.messaging:kafka` 버전을 `2.0.19`로 상향합니다.

### 작업 내용
- `build.gradle.kts`에서 `doodlin.messaging:kafka:2.0.18` -> `2.0.19` 변경
- `domain`, `interfaces`, `batch`, `file-processor` 기준 Kafka 연관 compile 검증
- Kafka 설정/producer 경로 회귀 확인을 위한 선별 테스트 실행

### 체크리스트
- [x] 빌드 확인
- [x] 테스트 통과

### 연관된 backend application
- `greeting-new-back/domain`
- `greeting-new-back/interfaces`
- `greeting-new-back/batch`
- `greeting-new-back/file-processor`

### 추가 유의사항
- 변경 범위는 루트 의존성 상향 1건입니다.
- 검증 커맨드
  - `./gradlew :domain:clean :domain:compileKotlin :interfaces:compileKotlin :batch:compileKotlin :file-processor:compileKotlin`
  - `./gradlew :interfaces:test --tests 'doodlin.greeting.common.config.AvroKafkaConfigurationTest'`
  - `./gradlew :domain:test --tests 'doodlin.greeting.evaluation.evaluation.EvaluationKafkaPublisherTest'`
prInfo.author: junney-jang

changedFiles.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+package doodlin.greeting.common.config
+
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertNotSame
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test
+import org.mockito.kotlin.mock
+import org.mockito.kotlin.times
+import org.mockito.kotlin.verify
+import org.mockito.kotlin.verifyNoMoreInteractions
+import org.mockito.kotlin.whenever
+import org.springframework.web.reactive.function.client.WebClient
+
+class WebClientConfigTest {
+
+    @Test
+    fun `creates each webclient bean from a cloned builder`() {
+        val rootBuilder = mock<WebClient.Builder>()
+        whenever(rootBuilder.clone()).thenReturn(
+            WebClient.builder(),
+            WebClient.builder(),
+            WebClient.builder(),
+            WebClient.builder(),
+            WebClient.builder()
+        )
+
+        val config = WebClientConfig(rootBuilder)
+
+        val webClient = config.webClient()
+        val orpWebClient = config.orpWebClient()
+        val orpWebClientDevMode = config.orpWebClientDevMode()
+        val longTimeWebClient = config.longTimeWebClient()
+        val redirectUrlAllowWebClient = config.redirectUrlAllowWebClient()
+
+        assertNotSame(webClient, orpWebClient)
+        assertNotSame(orpWebClient, orpWebClientDevMode)
+        assertNotSame(orpWebClientDevMode, longTimeWebClient)
+        assertNotSame(longTimeWebClient, redirectUrlAllowWebClient)
+
+        verify(rootBuilder, times(5)).clone()
+        verifyNoMoreInteractions(rootBuilder)
+    }
+}
